verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Are you going to love Him? Amen! Are you going to praise Him? Amen! Are you going to worship Him? Amen! Amen! Amen!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Do you love Him? Amen! Will you serve Him? Amen! Do you believe Him? Amen! Amen! Amen!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The Bible's true. Amen! I believe it. Amen! It's the word of God. Amen! Amen! Amen!

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We believe You're coming. Amen! We're ready to meet You. Amen! Come, Lord Jesus. Amen! Amen! Amen!
